NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSE TO DISCOVERY, ORDER FOR THE GENUINENESS OF DOCUMENTS AND TRUTH OF MATTERS ASSERTED AND IMPOSITION OF MONETARY SANCTIONS, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC HEARING SET FOR SEP-28-2011 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 301

DISCOVERY 302, THE COURT VACATED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSE TO DISCOVERY, ORDER FOR THE GENUINENESS OF DOCUMENTS AND TRUTH OF MATTERS ASSERTED AND IMPOSITION OF MONETARY SANCTIONS - MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES IS GRANTED. FURTHER RESPONSES TO BE DONE WITHIN 15 DAYS FROM NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER. THE COURT DID NOT AWARD SANCTIONS. COURTESY COPIES WERE DELIVERED LATE. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; NOT REPORTED.
MINI MINUTES FOR SEP-28-2011 9:0 AM FOR DEPT 301

DISCOVERY 301, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSE TO DISCOVERY, ORDER FOR THE GENUINENESS OF DOCUMENTS AND TRUTH OF MATTERS ASSERTED AND IMPOSITION OF MONETARY SANCTIONS IS CONTINUED TO 10/6/11, FOR THE PLAINTIFF TO PROVIDE COURTESY COPIES OF ITS MOVING PAPERS INCLUDING PROOF OF SERVICE, TO DEPARTMENT 302, NO LATER THAN 9/29/11, IN CONFORMITY WITH SAN FRANCISCO LOCAL RULE 2.6(B). JUDGE: ERNEST GOLDSMITH, NOT REPORTED. (301/EHG)

*** CASE DISMISSED *** REMOVED FROM MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR NOV-14-2011. THE COURT ORDERED THE CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AT THE REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF. JUDGE: KATHERINE FEINSTEIN; CLERK: E. BURA; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-14-2011 Dismissal - No Appearance

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Response To Discovery, Order For The Genuineness Of Documents And Truth Of Matters Asserted And Imposition Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Oct-06-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court vacated its tentative ruling and ruled as follows: -
PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC'S Motion To Compel Response To Discovery, Order For The Genuineness Of Documents And Truth Of Matters Asserted And Imposition Of Monetary Sanctions - Motion to compel responses is granted. Further responses to be done within 15 days from notice of entry of order. The court did not award sanctions. Courtesy copies were delivered late. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported. = (302/HEK)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Response To Discovery, Order For The Genuineness Of Documents And Truth Of Matters Asserted And Imposition Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Sep-28-2011 Continued To Oct-06-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC'S Motion To Compel Response To Discovery, Order For The Genuineness Of Documents And Truth Of Matters Asserted And Imposition Of Monetary Sanctions.
Continued to 10/6/11, for the plaintiff to provide courtesy copies of its moving papers including proof of service, to department 302, no later than 9/29/11, in conformity with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6(b). Judge: Ernest Goldsmith, Not reported = (301/EHG)
